## Meeting purpose

[Impromptu team check-in and discussion on market opportunities, particularly in the contact center space.](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team morale ranges from 5-8/10, with common themes of high workload and fast-paced environment](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Recent Alkion VC meeting validated DeepGram's market opportunity, especially in contact centers (17M agents in US alone)](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Potential campaign idea: "Voice Economy" to highlight market size and DeepGram's position](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Need for focused marketing efforts on contact center use cases to build brand awareness and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates and Work Sentiment

  - [Team members shared personal highlights (e.g., concerts, camping, pet recovery)](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Work sentiments ranged from 5-8/10, citing high workload but also accomplishments](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Common themes: fast-paced environment, pressure to deliver quickly, need for better prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Market Opportunity Insights

  - [Alkion VC meeting validated DeepGram's market potential](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Contact center opportunity: 17M agents in US alone, $8B/year on knowledge worker tasks](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Voice economy terminology resonated well, potential for campaign](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Partner strategy currently appropriate, but future potential for more comprehensive solutions](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Marketing Strategy Discussion

  - [Proposal to increase focus on contact center use cases in marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Idea for "Contact Center 2.0" or "AI-led Contact Center" campaign](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Goal: Build brand awareness and credibility in the contact center space](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Suggestion to repurpose existing content and add DeepGram's unique perspective](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)

### Content and Campaign Ideas

  - [Create a comprehensive asset on the "Voice Economy"](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Develop thought leadership pieces for industry publications (e.g., CCW)](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Analyze public companies' financials to demonstrate potential ROI of AI in contact centers](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Consider hosting a virtual event around the Voice Economy concept](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Google Algorithm Update Impact

  - [Recent Google core update negatively affected DeepGram's visibility](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Team monitoring potential impact on leads and form fills](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore creating content and campaigns focused on contact center use cases](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Develop a "Voice Economy" asset as a lead generation magnet](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Analyze public companies' financials to create compelling ROI narratives](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Consider drafting a thought leadership piece for industry publication](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Monitor and address the impact of recent Google algorithm update on visibility and leads](https://fathom.video/share/aaKNBFiHyogKpDDuQjJP_wf6ztKkZBTD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
